name: Workplace Difficulties Case
history: Ongoing workplace difficulties involving underappreciation and lack of support. Repeated experiences of ideas and suggestions not being accepted.
intermediate_belief_depression: I will never be recognized for my efforts.
coping_strategies: Avoids sharing ideas and minimizes interactions with colleagues.
situation: Colleagues praise a coworker and ask the patient for help with technology issues related to that coworker.
auto_thought: They don't value my contributions, only my technical skills.
behavior: Withdraws from team discussions and avoids offering suggestions.
